books.title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
books.author: Robert T. Kiyosaki
books.description: Rich Dad Poor Dad is Robert Kiyosaki's story of growing up with two dads — his real father and the father of his best friend, his rich dad — and the ways in which both men shaped his thoughts about money and investing. The book explodes the myth that you need to earn a high income to be rich and explains the difference between working for money and having your money work for you.
toc: The Rich Don't Work for Money
Work to Learn — Don't Work for Money

reviews.title: Life changing
reviews.body: Completely changed how I think about money and assets. A must read for every student.

reviews.title: Great primer
reviews.body: Simple language, powerful ideas. Some parts feel repetitive but worth it.

books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.description: No matter your goals, Atomic Habits offers a proven framework for improving — every day. James Clear reveals practical strategies that will teach you exactly how to form good habits, break bad ones, and master the tiny behaviors that lead to remarkable results.

reviews.title: Practical and actionable
reviews.body: The habit stacking technique genuinely works. Finished it twice.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: Paulo Coelho's masterpiece tells the mystical story of Santiago, an Andalusian shepherd boy who yearns to travel in search of a worldly treasure. His quest will lead him to riches far different — and far more satisfying — than he ever imagined.

reviews.title: Beautiful
reviews.body: A fable about following your dreams. Reads like poetry.

books.title: NCERT Physics Part I & II — Class 12
books.author: NCERT
books.description: Official NCERT Physics textbook for Class 12 (Part I & II), the foundational book for CBSE board exams, JEE and NEET. Covers electrostatics, current electricity, magnetism, optics, modern physics and more.

reviews.title: Genuine NCERT
reviews.body: Original print, crisp pages, delivered in 2 days.

books.title: Mathematics Class 12 (Volume 1 & 2)
books.author: R.D. Sharma
books.description: The most trusted reference book for Class 12 Mathematics. Exhaustive theory with graded examples and practice problems — ideal for CBSE boards and JEE Main preparation.

reviews.title: Best for boards + JEE
reviews.body: Huge question bank. Solved examples are gold.

books.title: Concepts of Physics Vol. 1 & 2
books.author: H.C. Verma
books.description: H.C. Verma's Concepts of Physics is the bible for JEE and NEET aspirants. Crystal-clear theory paired with thought-provoking objective and subjective problems that build rock-solid fundamentals.

reviews.title: JEE essential
reviews.body: If you can solve HCV, JEE physics becomes easy.

books.title: Objective Mathematics for JEE Main & Advanced
books.author: R.D. Sharma
books.description: Comprehensive objective-type question bank for JEE Main & Advanced with previous year questions, topic-wise MCQs and detailed solutions.

reviews.title: Solid practice
reviews.body: Massive collection of problems with good solutions.

books.title: NEET 40 Years Chapterwise Solved Papers (PCB)
books.author: Arihant Experts
books.description: Complete chapterwise and topicwise solved papers of 40 years of NEET/AIPMT for Physics, Chemistry and Biology with detailed explanations, NCERT references and trend analysis.

reviews.title: Perfect for NEET prep
reviews.body: Solutions map to NCERT lines. Extremely useful.

books.title: NEET Guide — Biology
books.author: MTG Editorial Board
books.description: Complete NEET Biology guide covering the entire NCERT syllabus with theory, NCERT-based MCQs, assertion-reason questions and previous year questions.

reviews.title: Very NCERT aligned
reviews.body: Great for last-mile revision.

books.title: Indian Polity
books.author: M. Laxmikanth
books.description: The definitive book on Indian Polity for UPSC Civil Services and State PSC examinations. Covers the Constitution, governance, Parliament, judiciary and local government with unmatched clarity.

reviews.title: UPSC bible
reviews.body: One book to rule polity. The 7th edition is updated with latest amendments.

books.title: Quantitative Aptitude
books.author: R.S. Aggarwal
books.description: The evergreen aptitude book for every competitive exam — SSC, banking, railways, campus placements. 6000+ questions with fully worked solutions.

reviews.title: One-stop for quant
reviews.body: Solved fully for my SBI PO prep. Highly recommended.

books.title: Gray's Anatomy for Students
books.author: Richard Drake, A. Wayne Vogl
books.description: The most student-friendly anatomy textbook, fully revised with clinical case boxes, imaging correlations and surface anatomy — ideal for MBBS first year.

reviews.title: Best anatomy text
reviews.body: Clinical boxes make anatomy stick. Fast delivery, sealed pack.

books.title: Robbins Basic Pathology
books.author: Vinay Kumar, Abul Abbas
books.description: The gold standard pathology text for medical students, covering general and systemic pathology with superb illustrations and clinical correlations.

reviews.title: Pathology simplified
reviews.body: Papa Robbins never disappoints. Original edition confirmed.

books.title: Harrison's Principles of Internal Medicine (2 Vols)
books.author: Dennis Kasper et al.
books.description: The most trusted textbook of internal medicine worldwide. Two-volume set with 4,300 pages of authoritative, evidence-based clinical content.

reviews.title: The reference
reviews.body: Essential for final year and PG prep.

books.title: B.D. Chaurasia's Human Anatomy (4 Vols)
books.author: B.D. Chaurasia
books.description: India's most widely used anatomy textbook set for MBBS. Clear line diagrams, exam-oriented text, and clinical anatomy sections in every chapter.

reviews.title: Exam saviour
reviews.body: Every anatomy viva answer is in here.

books.title: Higher Engineering Mathematics
books.author: B.S. Grewal
books.description: The standard engineering mathematics text used across Indian universities — calculus, linear algebra, differential equations, complex analysis, numerical methods and probability.

reviews.title: University essential
reviews.body: Covers the entire B.Tech math syllabus.

books.title: Introduction to Algorithms (CLRS)
books.author: Thomas H. Cormen, et al.
books.description: The definitive algorithms textbook covering sorting, data structures, graph algorithms, dynamic programming, NP-completeness and advanced topics. Essential for CS students and interview prep.

reviews.title: The CLRS
reviews.body: Dense but complete. My go-to for placement prep.

books.title: Strength of Materials
books.author: Timoshenko & Gere
books.description: Classic treatment of mechanics of materials — stress, strain, bending, torsion, deflection and columns with rigorous derivations and engineering applications.

reviews.title: Solid theory
reviews.body: The derivations are beautiful. Great for GATE too.

books.title: Wings of Fire: An Autobiography
books.author: A.P.J. Abdul Kalam
books.description: The autobiography of Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam — from Rameswaram to Rashtrapati Bhavan. A story of perseverance, science and service to the nation.

reviews.title: Inspiring
reviews.body: Every Indian student should read this.

books.title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.description: How did Homo sapiens come to dominate the world? Harari explores the Cognitive, Agricultural and Scientific Revolutions that shaped humanity — provocative, sweeping and unputdownable.

reviews.title: Mind-expanding
reviews.body: Changed how I see money, nations and religion.

books.title: The Psychology of Money
books.author: Morgan Housel
books.description: Doing well with money has surprisingly little to do with how smart you are and a lot to do with how you behave. Through 19 short stories, Housel explores the strange ways people think about wealth, greed and happiness.

reviews.title: Best finance book
reviews.body: Short chapters, deep lessons. Bought copies for friends.

books.title: One Indian Girl
books.author: Chetan Bhagat
books.description: Meet Radhika Mehta — a high-flying investment banker who is about to get married, but two ex-boyfriends show up at her destination wedding. A witty take on love, ambition and modern Indian relationships.

reviews.title: Fun read
reviews.body: Finished on one train journey. Classic Chetan Bhagat.

books.title: Half Girlfriend
books.author: Chetan Bhagat
books.description: Madhav Jha, a boy from Bihar, falls for Riya Somani, a rich Delhi girl, at St. Stephen's College. She agrees to be his "half girlfriend". A rural-urban love story that became a Bollywood film.

reviews.title: Easy read
reviews.body: Simple English, good for beginners.

books.title: The Guide
books.author: R.K. Narayan
books.description: Raju the tourist guide becomes an unwilling holy man in this Sahitya Akademi Award-winning novel from the creator of Malgudi. A masterpiece of irony and transformation.

reviews.title: Timeless
reviews.body: The ending still gives me chills.

books.title: Feluda Samagra (Vol 1 & 2)
books.author: Satyajit Ray
books.description: সত্যজিৎ রায়ের সকল ৩৫টি ফেলুদা গল্পের সম্পূর্ণ সংকলন — The complete collection of all 35 Feluda detective stories by Satyajit Ray. A treasure for every Bengali reader.

reviews.title: অসাধারণ সংকলন
reviews.body: ছেলেবেলার স্মৃতি। ছাপার মান চমৎকার।

books.title: Srikanta
books.author: Sarat Chandra Chattopadhyay
books.description: শরৎচন্দ্রের কালজয়ী উপন্যাস শ্রীকান্ত — Sarat Chandra's timeless novel of a wanderer's encounters with unforgettable women like Rajlakshmi and Abhaya. A cornerstone of Bengali literature.

reviews.title: জীবনের বই
reviews.body: একাধিকবার পড়েছি, প্রতিবার নতুন লাগে।

books.title: Professor Shonku Samagra
books.author: Satyajit Ray
books.description: অবিশ্বাস্য বিজ্ঞানী প্রফেসর শঙ্কুর সকল অভিযান — All Professor Shonku science fiction adventures in one collector's volume.

reviews.title: Sci-fi before its time
reviews.body: Ray imagined AI in the 60s. Genius.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: The book that started it all. Harry Potter discovers he is a wizard and begins his first year at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.
toc: The Journey from Platform Nine and Three-Quarters

reviews.title: Magical
reviews.body: Bought for my daughter, ended up re-reading myself.

books.title: The Lord of the Rings (One Volume Edition)
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.description: Tolkien's epic masterpiece in a single volume — the Fellowship's quest to destroy the One Ring and defeat Sauron. The defining fantasy novel of the 20th century.

reviews.title: Epic
reviews.body: The worldbuilding is unmatched. Stunning edition.

books.author: George Orwell
books.description: Orwell's chilling vision of a totalitarian future where Big Brother watches everything. More relevant today than ever — a warning about surveillance, propaganda and the manipulation of truth.

reviews.title: Terrifyingly relevant
reviews.body: Read it once a year. Never gets old.

books.title: The Kite Runner
books.author: Khaled Hosseini
books.description: Amir and Hassan's friendship in 1970s Kabul is shattered by one act of betrayal. A devastating, unforgettable novel about guilt, redemption and the power of fathers and sons.

reviews.title: Heartbreaking
reviews.body: Cried multiple times. For you, a thousand times over.

books.title: To Kill a Mockingbird — 1960 First Edition Facsimile
books.author: Harper Lee
books.description: A faithful facsimile of the 1960 first edition of Harper Lee's Pulitzer Prize-winning novel, with original dust jacket artwork. A collector's item for serious bibliophiles.

reviews.title: Collector grade
reviews.body: Arrived in pristine condition with archival wrapping.

books.title: The Complete Sherlock Holmes — Leatherbound Collector's Edition
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.description: All four novels and 56 short stories of Sherlock Holmes in a bonded-leather collector's edition with gilded edges and ribbon marker.

reviews.title: Gorgeous binding
reviews.body: Feels like an heirloom. Gift-wrapped beautifully.

books.title: NCERT Chemistry Part I & II — Class 11
books.author: NCERT
books.description: Official NCERT Chemistry textbook for Class 11, essential for boards, JEE and NEET. Covers physical, inorganic and organic chemistry fundamentals.

reviews.title: Genuine book
reviews.body: Original NCERT print at a discount.

books.title: ICSE Total English — Class 10
books.author: Xavier Pinto, Selina
books.description: Complete English language and literature guide for ICSE Class 10 with grammar, composition, comprehension and specimen papers as per the latest CISCE syllabus.

reviews.title: ICSE aligned
reviews.body: Matches the latest paper pattern.

books.title: Indian Economy
books.author: Ramesh Singh
books.description: The go-to book for Indian Economy for UPSC Prelims and Mains, updated with the latest budget, economic survey and policy developments.

reviews.title: Updated edition
reviews.body: Latest budget data included. UPSC-ready.

books.title: Modern's ABC of Physics — Class 12
books.author: S.P. Jauhar
books.description: Detailed physics reference bridging Class 12 and first-year B.Sc, with exhaustive theory, derivations and solved numericals.

reviews.title: Detailed
reviews.body: Good alternative when NCERT feels too brief.

books.title: Principles of Economics
books.author: N. Gregory Mankiw
books.description: The world's most popular economics textbook. Mankiw's ten principles and clear exposition make it the standard text for undergraduate economics courses across Indian universities.

reviews.title: Best intro to econ
reviews.body: DU syllabus covered completely.

books.title: Let Us C
books.author: Yashavant Kanetkar
books.description: India's bestselling C programming book for over two decades. Learn C from scratch with hundreds of examples and exercises — the first programming book for lakhs of students.

reviews.title: Nostalgia + value
reviews.body: Learned C from this 10 years ago, bought for my nephew.

books.title: Ikigai: The Japanese Secret to a Long and Happy Life
books.author: Héctor García, Francesc Miralles
books.description: The international bestseller that reveals the Japanese concept of ikigai — your reason for being — through the lives of the world's longest-living people in Okinawa.
toc: Find Flow in Everything You Do

reviews.title: Calming read
reviews.body: Gentle wisdom. Beautiful cover too.

books.title: Atomic Habits (Hindi Edition)
books.author: James Clear (Hindi Translation)
books.description: Atomic Habits का आधिकारिक हिंदी अनुवाद — छोटी आदतें, असाधारण परिणाम। James Clear's classic, now in Hindi.

reviews.title: बेहतरीन अनुवाद
reviews.body: हिंदी में पढ़कर और भी अच्छा लगा।

books.title: GATE 2026 Computer Science — 39 Years Solved Papers
books.author: GK Publications
books.description: Chapter-wise solved GATE CS papers from 1987–2025 with detailed solutions, topic weightage analysis and free online mock tests.

reviews.title: GATE-ready
reviews.body: Solutions are crisp. The weightage charts help plan.

books.title: Essentials of Medical Pharmacology
books.author: K.D. Tripathi
books.description: India's most trusted pharmacology textbook — rational drug therapy, classification tables and exam-focused presentation for MBBS second professional.

reviews.title: MBBS standard
reviews.body: Tables make revision so fast. Jaypee original.

books.title: Panchatantra: The Complete Classic Tales
books.author: Vishnu Sharma (Retold)
books.description: The complete Panchatantra with beautiful illustrations — timeless animal fables of wisdom, friendship and cleverness that have taught children for 2,000 years.

reviews.title: Kids loved it
reviews.body: My 7-year-old asks for one story every night.

books.title: Byomkesh Bakshi Samagra
books.author: Sharadindu Bandyopadhyay
books.description: ব্যোমকেশ বক্সীর সমস্ত গোয়েন্দা কাহিনীর সংকলন — The complete Byomkesh Bakshi detective stories by Sharadindu Bandyopadhyay in one handsome volume.

reviews.title: সত্যিকারের রত্ন
reviews.body: আনন্দের ছাপা সবসময় ভালো। দ্রুত ডেলিভারি।

books.title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
books.author: Daniel Kahneman
books.description: Nobel laureate Daniel Kahneman takes us on a tour of the mind — the fast, intuitive System 1 and the slow, logical System 2 — and reveals how our choices are shaped by biases we never notice.

reviews.title: Dense but rewarding
reviews.body: Took me two months. Worth every page.

books.title: Operating System Concepts
books.author: Silberschatz, Galvin, Gagne
books.description: The "dinosaur book" — the standard OS text covering processes, threads, scheduling, synchronization, deadlocks, memory management and file systems.

reviews.title: University standard
reviews.body: Matches our syllabus exactly. Wiley India print.

books.title: The Almanack of Naval Ravikant
books.author: Eric Jorgenson
books.description: A curated collection of Naval Ravikant's wisdom on building wealth and finding happiness — drawn from his tweets, podcasts and essays. Specific knowledge, leverage and judgment, distilled.

reviews.title: Re-read monthly
reviews.body: Every page is quotable.
